mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k jobs signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in housing starts and real sales figures indicate strong private sector demand, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint increase in HOUST and RSAFS fails to produce positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in industrial production above its 3-month moving average signals recovering manufacturing activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO rebounds but SPX shows negative 60-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or the signal's IC falls below 0.02 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% triggers central bank tightening expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2%, or the signal's IC drops below -0.03 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment rate below 4.5% during a monetary tightening cycle signals labor market overheating, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The combination of UNRATE < 4.5 and FEDFUNDS > 4.5% fails to produce negative 5-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly contraction in GDP growth below 2% signals economic weakness, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 60-day returns in 60%+ of instances where GDPC1 falls below 2%, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production below its 6-month moving average indicates weakening supply-side dynamics, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines but SPX shows positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of cases, or the signal's IC falls below -0.03 in rolling 2-year windows.
